name: the SARIF bus deduplicates an identical finding reported in two separate tool documents
command: node -e 'process.stdout.write(JSON.stringify({version:"2.1.0",runs:[{tool:{driver:{name:"checkov"}},results:[{ruleId:"CKV_AWS_18",level:"error",message:{text:"S3 access logging disabled"},locations:[{physicalLocation:{artifactLocation:{uri:"main.tf"},region:{startLine:1}}}]}]}]}))' > red.sarif; cp red.sarif red2.sarif; bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/sarif-aggregate.sh" --in red.sarif --in red2.sarif 2>e.txt; grep -qE 'sarif-aggregate status=red tools=1 error=1 ' e.txt && echo bus-dedup-identical 1>&2
